urgency_sms.input: FINAL NOTICE: Your Union Bank account shows suspicious activity. Reply STOP within 30 minutes or it will be permanently locked.

output.reason: The message uses high-pressure tactics, a strict 30-minute deadline, and threats of account suspension to force a quick response.
output.alert_text_tech: Phishing attempt detected. High-urgency social engineering threat of account lockout to force SMS interaction. Do not reply.
output.alert_text_standard: This is a scam. Union Bank will never threaten to lock your account in 30 minutes. Do not reply to this message.
output.alert_text_elderly: This message is fake. Do not reply to it. Your bank account is safe. If you are worried, please call the bank directly.

fake_prize.input: Congratulations! Your number won ₦2,000,000 in the Union Bank Anniversary Promo. Send your BVN and card PIN to claim your prize now.

output.reason: The message is a phishing scam requesting sensitive credentials (BVN and card PIN) under the guise of a promotional prize.
output.alert_text_tech: Phishing attempt detected: Social engineering via fake promo. Requests BVN and card PIN. Never share credentials.
output.alert_text_standard: This is a scam. Union Bank will never ask for your BVN or card PIN to claim a prize. Do not reply or share your details.
output.alert_text_elderly: This is a trick by thieves to steal your money. Do not send your PIN or BVN. Call the bank directly if you are worried.

account_suspension.input: Dear customer, your BVN has been suspended. Re-validate immediately at http://union-bank-secure.link/verify to avoid account closure.

output.reason: The message uses a fake BVN suspension threat and a suspicious lookalike link to steal banking credentials.
output.alert_text_tech: Phishing alert: Fake BVN suspension notice using a spoofed domain (union-bank-secure.link) to harvest credentials. Do not click.
output.alert_text_standard: Warning: This is a scam. Union Bank will never ask you to update your BVN via a link. Do not click the link or share any details.
output.alert_text_elderly: This message is fake. Your bank account is safe. Do not click the link. Do not give anyone your BVN or card details. Call the bank if worried.

otp_request.input: This is Union Bank support. We are fixing your account. Please read me the 6-digit code we just sent so we can verify you.

output.reason: The sender is impersonating Union Bank support to steal a 6-digit OTP, which is a classic credential-harvesting scam.
output.alert_text_tech: Suspicious OTP request detected. Union Bank will never ask for your 6-digit verification code over the phone or chat. Do not share it.
output.alert_text_standard: Warning: This is a scam. Union Bank will never ask you to read out a 6-digit code. Do not share any codes with anyone.
output.alert_text_elderly: This is a scam. Do not tell anyone the 6-digit code sent to your phone. Hang up and call the bank directly.

delivery_fee.input: Your parcel is held at customs. Pay a ₦3,500 clearance fee to 0812XXInvalidPay or it will be returned. Click bit.ly/clear-parcel.

output.reason: The message uses a fake customs clearance pretext and a shortened link to solicit unauthorized payments.
output.alert_text_tech: Phishing attempt: Fake customs clearance fee request using a shortened bit.ly link to harvest payment details. Do not click or pay.
output.alert_text_standard: This is a scam. Customs or delivery companies will not ask you to pay fees via a random link or phone number. Do not click the link.
output.alert_text_elderly: This message is a trick. Do not click the link and do not send any money. Your bank or parcel is safe. Call Union Bank if you are worried.
